data.content: Dependency knots-c8f4 remains at ready_for_plan_review. The canonical ArtifactTarget vocabulary (branch, pull_request, merged_main, live_deployment) needed for this beat's prompt template conditionals does not exist in the codebase. Current OutputMode enum in src/profile.rs still has Local/Remote/Pr/RemoteMain, and prompt templates only declare values [remote_main, pr]. Resume this beat after c8f4 is implemented and merged, then: (1) add branch/merged_main/live_deployment to prompt param enum values in all 4 templates, (2) add conditional {{ output }} sections for each new target, (3) add test assertions in loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests.rs for new target rendering across profiles.
